title: Lexington & Richland County School District Five ransomware incident

victim.name: Lexington & Richland County School District Five

extortion.description: School District Five of Lexington & Richland Counties, commonly referred to as District Five, was organized by action of the Lexington County Board of Education in 1951 and the Richland County Board of Education in 1952. The school district has three attendance areas: Chapin, Dutch Fork, and Irmo. District Five operates elementary schools, intermediate schools, middle schools, high schools, a Center for Advanced Technical Studies and an alternative school.
